---
title: "hmsc - cells - p/a & abundance - many model comparison"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

Model diagnostics for hmsc

Basic model analysis for many different input variable scenarios.
Then move on to comparing spatial patterns.


```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
## user settings
usr <- "VM"
source("0_SourceFile.R")

analysis_dir   <- paste0(usr.main.dir, "3_model_analysis")

res <- "2km"

model_ids <- c(
  "npp_cafe", "npp_cbpm", "npp_eppl", "npp_vpmg",
  "fam_cafe", "fam_cbpm")#, "fam_eppl", "fam_vpmg")

library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)

extract_metrics <- function(nm) {
  f <- file.path(
    analysis_dir,
    paste0(res, "_model_cells_", nm, "_ENV_pa_ab_MF_CV.Rdata")
  )
  load(f)  # loads: MF, MF.cv, models, XFormula, etc.
  tibble(
    model_id = nm,
    ## ENV model (presence–absence)
    ENV_RMSE      = mean(MF$mENV$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    ENV_AUC       = mean(MF$mENV$AUC, na.rm = TRUE),
    ENV_TjurR2    = mean(MF$mENV$TjurR2, na.rm = TRUE),
    ENV_RMSE_CV   = mean(MF.cv$mENV$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    ENV_AUC_CV    = mean(MF.cv$mENV$AUC, na.rm = TRUE),
    ENV_TjurR2_CV = mean(MF.cv$mENV$TjurR2, na.rm = TRUE),
    ## AB model (abundance)
    AB_RMSE       = mean(MF$mAB$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE),
    AB_RMSE_CV    = mean(MF.cv$mAB$RMSE, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}
results <- map_dfr(model_ids, extract_metrics)
results

results %>%  arrange(desc(ENV_AUC_CV))

results %>%  arrange(AB_RMSE_CV)

```
